name: Bellamy
description:
__Height:__ 240 cm (7'10")
__Devil Fruit:__ Bane Bane no Mi (Spring Spring Fruit)
__Devil Fruit Type:__ Paramecia

Bellamy "The Hyena"  is the captain of the crew and has a 55,000,000 Beli bounty. Bellamy earned his nickname from his trademark grin and his reputation for scavenging riches from other pirates, much like a hyena scavenges its food. Bellamy's character is one that is arrogant, violent and vain, but significantly humbled when facing more powerful foes, as he revealed to Donquixote Doflamingo that he only engages in fights that he knows he can win. This later led to his defeat by Monkey D. Luffy, whom Bellamy thought was weak. Bellamy and his pirate crew play a significant role in the Jaya Arc of the series.
